name: Feature Request — Bookstore Reserve
input: I have a Rails app for managing a bookstore. I need to add a feature where customers can reserve books and pick them up in-store.
mock_answers: The app uses Rails 7 with Hotwire, PostgreSQL, and Tailwind. We have Book, Customer, and Order models already. The UI has a book catalog page and a customer dashboard. We use Devise for auth.
